name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải - Quản lý bởi Flamingo Hotels & Resorts (Flamingo Dai Lai Resort - Managed by Flamingo Hotels & Resorts)
address: Th n Đại Quang, phường Xu n H a, tỉnh Ph Thọ, Ngọc Thanh, Phúc Yên, Việt Nam
description:
Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải - Nơi lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ hoàn hảo

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải, một khách sạn 5 sao nằm tại Phúc Yên, Việt Nam, sẽ mang đến cho bạn những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ trong kỳ nghỉ của mình. Với vị trí thuận lợi, khách sạn cung cấp một không gian nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời giữa thiên nhiên tươi đẹp và không khí trong lành.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải có tổng cộng 106 phòng, đảm bảo sẽ đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của du khách. Khách sạn được xây dựng vào năm 2009, mang đến cho bạn không chỉ sự sang trọng và tiện nghi mà còn sự ấm cúng và thoải mái. Với thiết kế hiện đại và trang thiết bị tiện nghi, mỗi phòng đều được trang bị đầy đủ để bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Khi đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải, bạn sẽ được tận hưởng thời gian nhàn rỗi tại một khu vườn xanh mát, cùng với các tiện ích tuyệt vời. Thời gian check-in của khách sạn là từ 02:00 PM và check-out là đến 12:00 PM, giúp bạn linh hoạt trong việc lựa chọn thời gian nghỉ dưỡng. Với khoảng cách chỉ 45 km từ trung tâm thành phố, bạn có thể dễ dàng khám phá các điểm tham quan và mua sắm. Nếu bạn đến bằng máy bay, sân bay chỉ cách khách sạn 20 phút đi xe.

Trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải ở Phúc Yên, Việt Nam, không chỉ nổi tiếng với các tiện nghi sang trọng và phòng nghỉ đẳng cấp mà còn cung cấp nhiều tiện ích giải trí đa dạng để du khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Đầu tiên, khách sạn có một quầy bar nơi du khách có thể thưởng thức các loại đồ uống tuyệt vời trong không gian sang trọng và ấm cúng. Nếu bạn muốn làm mới bản thân, bạn có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ làm tóc và làm đẹp tại salon của khách sạn. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có dịch vụ massage chuyên nghiệp để giúp bạn thư giãn và làm dịu cơ thể mệt mỏi.

Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn hơn, bạn có thể tận hưởng không gian xông hơi và spa tại khu nghỉ dưỡng. Đây là nơi lý tưởng để bạn tận hưởng những liệu pháp thư giãn và tái tạo cơ thể. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có khu vườn xanh mát, phòng chơi game, thư viện và khu vực chung với TV để du khách có thể thư giãn và giải trí. Nếu bạn muốn hát karaoke và tận hưởng những giây phút vui vẻ, khách sạn cũng có phòng karaoke để bạn thỏa sức trình diễn. Tất cả những tiện ích này tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải sẽ mang đến cho bạn một trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời và đáng nhớ trong kỳ nghỉ của bạn.

Tiện ích thể thao tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai yêu thích hoạt động thể thao. Tại đây, du khách có thể tận hưởng không gian thể dục trong nhà với hồ bơi trong nhà và phòng tập thể hình. Đối với những ai yêu thích tennis, khu nghỉ dưỡng còn cung cấp sân tennis chuyên nghiệp. 

Ngoài ra, du khách cũng có thể tham gia các hoạt động thể thao trên nước như lướt ván buồm, câu cá và đi thuyền. Khu nghỉ dưỡng cung cấp các dịch vụ về thể thao trên nước bao gồm cả các loại thể thao trên nước có động cơ và không động cơ. Ngoài ra, du khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian ngoài trời tại hồ bơi ngoài trời của khu nghỉ dưỡng. 

Với sân golf mini, du khách có thể thể hiện khả năng chơi golf nhỏ gọn của mình. Ngoài ra, khu nghỉ dưỡng còn có trung tâm thể hình 24/7 để du khách có thể tập luyện vào bất kỳ thời điểm nào trong ngày. Với những tiện ích thể thao đa dạng và chất lượng, Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn kết hợp nghỉ dưỡng và thể thao.

Tiện nghi thuận tiện tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải tọa lạc tại Phúc Yên, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi thuận tiện đáng kinh ngạc. Với dịch vụ phòng 24/7, bạn có thể yên tâm gọi đồ ăn và đồ uống trực tiếp tới phòng của mình. Dịch vụ giặt là sẽ giúp bạn giữ quần áo luôn sạch sẽ và tươi mới trong suốt chuyến đi. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ phòng cũng được cung cấp để đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của bạn.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng cung cấp hệ thống hòm an toàn, giúp bạn bảo vệ tài sản quý giá trong suốt thời gian lưu trú. Đội ngũ lễ tân chuyên nghiệp sẽ hỗ trợ bạn với mọi yêu cầu và thông tin du lịch. Wi-Fi miễn phí không chỉ có ở các khu vực công cộng mà còn trong tất cả các phòng, giúp bạn kết nối với thế giới bên ngoài một cách dễ dàng. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ giặt là, dịch vụ làm khô, dịch vụ check-in/ check-out nhanh chóng và dịch vụ giữ hành lý cũng được cung cấp để đảm bảo sự tiện lợi tối đa cho khách hàng. Khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng có dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày và lò sưởi trong phòng để tạo ra không gian ấm cúng và thoải mái cho du khách.

Tiện ích vận chuyển tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải tọa lạc tại Phúc Yên, Việt Nam, cung cấp nhiều tiện ích vận chuyển đáng chú ý để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Đầu tiên, khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển từ sân bay đến khu nghỉ dưỡng một cách tiện lợi và nhanh chóng. 

Ngoài ra, Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải cũng có dịch vụ đậu xe valet, giúp khách hàng tiết kiệm thời gian và không gian khi tìm chỗ đậu xe. Đối với khách hàng tự lái, khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng có khu đỗ xe riêng, bảo đảm an toàn và tiện lợi. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón bằng xe bus, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng di chuyển trong khu nghỉ dưỡng và khám phá các điểm tham quan lân cận. 

Hơn nữa, Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải còn cung cấp dịch vụ đặt vé và hỗ trợ đặt vé cho khách hàng, giúp tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức trong việc lên kế hoạch du lịch. Với các tiện ích vận chuyển đa dạng và chất lượng, Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải cam kết mang đến cho khách hàng một trải nghiệm du lịch thoải mái và tiện lợi.

Tiện nghi phòng tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải tọa lạc tại Phúc Yên, Việt Nam, với những tiện nghi phòng đầy đủ để mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời. Mỗi phòng đều được trang bị máy lạnh để du khách có thể thoải mái nghỉ ngơi trong không gian mát mẻ. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn cũng cung cấp áo choàng tắm và máy sấy tóc, giúp du khách tận hưởng những phút giây thư giãn sau một ngày dạo chơi ngoài trời. 

Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức những đồ uống mát lạnh hoặc những món ăn nhẹ, phòng của bạn cũng có minibar để đáp ứng nhu cầu của bạn. Bên cạnh đó, từ ban công hay sân hiên riêng của phòng, du khách có thể ngắm nhìn khung cảnh tuyệt đẹp xung quanh khu nghỉ dưỡng. Để giải trí, khách sạn cũng trang bị TV vệ tinh/cáp và tủ lạnh, giúp du khách có thể thư giãn và xem các kênh yêu thích. Cuối cùng, nếu du khách muốn tận hưởng không gian ấm cúng, một số phòng còn có lò sưởi để tạo ra không khí ấm áp và thân thiện.

Trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải không chỉ đem đến cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời mà còn là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích ẩm thực. Với các tiện nghi như dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, quán cà phê, nhà hàng và dịch vụ phòng, du khách có thể tận hưởng những bữa ăn ngon tại chính khu nghỉ dưỡng của mình.

Quán cà phê tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải là một nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức một tách cà phê thơm ngon và thư giãn. Nhà hàng tại đây cung cấp các món ăn đa dạng từ ẩm thực Việt Nam truyền thống đến các món ăn quốc tế hấp dẫn. Ngoài ra, du khách cũng có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại phòng với dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ. Khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng đảm bảo dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày để du khách luôn có môi trường sạch sẽ và thoải mái. Đặc biệt, khách hàng còn được thưởng thức bữa sáng tự chọn tại nhà hàng buffet hàng ngày để bắt đầu một ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng.

Các loại phòng đa dạng tại Flamingo Resort Dai Lai dành cho mọi nhu cầu lưu trú

Tại Flamingo Resort Dai Lai, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng phù hợp với từng sở thích và nhóm khách hàng. Từ các căn Villa rộng rãi như Villa 2 Bedroom với diện tích 150m² và hai giường đôi, đến Villa 4 Bedroom lớn nhất với diện tích 600m², phù hợp cho gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn đông người. Ngoài ra, các loại phòng như Forest Villa, Hill Top Villa, và các căn hộ Sky Residence đa dạng về kiểu dáng, số giường và diện tích, mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tiện nghi và sang trọng. Các phòng từ 1 đến 3 phòng ngủ đều được thiết kế tinh tế, mang lại không gian thoải mái, riêng tư cho khách lưu trú. Đặt phòng qua Agoda không chỉ giúp bạn có được mức giá tốt nhất mà còn mang lại trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, nhanh chóng, giúp bạn chuẩn bị cho kỳ nghỉ hoàn hảo tại Flamingo Dai Lai.

Khám phá vẻ đẹp tự nhiên tại Ngọc Thanh, Phúc Yên

Ngọc Thanh, một khu vực tuyệt đẹp tọa lạc ở Phúc Yên, Việt Nam, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng thiên nhiên hoang dã và thư giãn sau những ngày làm việc căng thẳng. Với khung cảnh thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp, Ngọc Thanh mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ.

Khu vực này nổi tiếng với những cánh đồng xanh mướt, những dãy đồi non nước, và những con suối trong trẻo. Du khách có thể tham gia vào các hoạt động như đi bộ đường dài, leo núi, và thả mình vào làn nước trong xanh của suối. Không chỉ có thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp, Ngọc Thanh còn nằm gần các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng khác như hồ Đại Lải và núi Tam Đảo.

Hãy đến Ngọc Thanh để tận hưởng những giây phút bình yên giữa thiên nhiên hoang dã và khám phá vẻ đẹp độc đáo của Phúc Yên, Việt Nam.

Hướng dẫn đi từ sân bay đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải nằm ở Ngọc Thanh, Phúc Yên, Việt Nam, và có thể được tiếp cận từ các sân bay gần Phúc Yên. Dưới đây là một số phương pháp để đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải từ các sân bay gần đó.

1. Sân bay Quốc tế Nội Bài (HAN):
- Khoảng cách từ sân bay Nội Bài đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải là khoảng 25 km.
- Bạn có thể thuê taxi hoặc xe ô tô riêng từ sân bay để đến khu nghỉ dưỡng. Thời gian đi từ sân bay Nội Bài đến đích mất khoảng 30-40 phút tùy thuộc vào tình trạng giao thông.

2. Sân bay Quốc tế Vân Đồn (VDO):
- Khoảng cách từ sân bay Vân Đồn đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải là khoảng 110 km.
- Bạn có thể thuê taxi hoặc xe ô tô riêng từ sân bay để đến khu nghỉ dưỡng. Thời gian đi từ sân bay Vân Đồn đến đích mất khoảng 2-3 giờ tùy thuộc vào tình trạng giao thông.

Khi đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải, bạn sẽ được trải nghiệm không gian xanh mát, hòa mình vào thiên nhiên tươi đẹp của Việt Nam. Khu nghỉ dưỡng cung cấp các dịch vụ tiện ích như hồ bơi, nhà hàng, spa và các hoạt động giải trí. Hãy sẵn sàng để tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ thú vị tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải!

Khám phá các điểm đến thú vị gần Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải tọa lạc gần hai điểm đến nổi tiếng là Sân Golf Đại Lải và Hồ Đại Lải. Với vị trí đắc địa, du khách có thể dễ dàng khám phá những trải nghiệm độc đáo tại hai địa điểm này.

Sân Golf Đại Lải là một trong những sân golf hàng đầu tại Việt Nam. Với thiết kế đẹp mắt và chất lượng dịch vụ tốt, sân golf này thu hút rất nhiều người chơi và du khách. Từ Flamingo Đại Lải, du khách chỉ mất vài phút đi xe để đến sân golf và thỏa sức thể hiện khả năng chơi golf của mình.

Hồ Đại Lải là một hồ nước tự nhiên tuyệt đẹp, được bao quanh bởi những ngọn núi xanh mướt. Du khách có thể tham gia các hoạt động như đi thuyền, câu cá hoặc đơn giản chỉ ngồi bên bờ hồ thư giãn và tận hưởng không khí trong lành. Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải cung cấp các dịch vụ thuê thuyền và câu cá để khách hàng có thể trải nghiệm những hoạt động thú vị trên hồ.

Giá trung bình của phòng tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải tọa lạc tại Phúc Yên, Việt Nam, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ sang trọng và đẳng cấp. Với giá trung bình của phòng là $164, Flamingo Đại Lải mang đến sự hài lòng và đáng giá cho khách hàng. So với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại Phúc Yên là $168, Flamingo Đại Lải không chỉ cung cấp những tiện nghi và dịch vụ tốt, mà còn mang đến một trải nghiệm đích thực cho du khách.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải: Đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng. Đứa trẻ của tôi rất thích và chắc chắn muốn quay lại. Biệt thự tuyệt vời, khu vực toàn bộ đẹp và được thiết kế tốt. Giường thoải mái, bữa sáng tuyệt vời. Chúng tôi đã thực sự thích biệt thự và có một chuyến đi đôi tuyệt vời. Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời. Khu vực được bố trí tốt và tài xế xe đưa đón rất hữu ích, chúng tôi sẽ quay lại. Phòng sạch sẽ và được trang bị đầy đủ. Nhân viên cũng tuyệt vời và luôn sẵn sàng khi chúng tôi cần họ. Bữa sáng tuyệt vời. Tất cả nhân viên đều nói tiếng Anh, nơi rất đẹp và sạch sẽ, thủ tục nhận phòng và trả phòng nhanh chóng.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải - Đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng với tổng điểm 8.6. Đánh giá về giá trị của khu nghỉ dưỡng là 8.5, cho thấy khách hàng cảm thấy hài lòng với giá cả hợp lý so với những dịch vụ và tiện nghi mà nơi này mang lại. Điểm 8.6 cho tiện nghi của khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng chứng tỏ rằng khách hàng được trải nghiệm những dịch vụ chất lượng và các tiện ích đáng giá tại đây.

Mặc dù điểm số cho thực phẩm và dịch vụ ăn uống chỉ là 6.5, nhưng điểm 8.7 cho sự sạch sẽ của khu nghỉ dưỡng cho thấy sự quan tâm và chăm sóc tận tâm của nhân viên. Vị trí của khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng được đánh giá cao với điểm số 8.5, cho thấy nơi này nằm ở một vị trí thuận lợi và dễ dàng di chuyển đến các điểm tham quan và giải trí trong khu vực.

Khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao mức độ thoải mái của khu nghỉ dưỡng với điểm số 8.8. Điều này chứng tỏ rằng khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Đại Lải mang đến những trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời và thoải mái cho khách hàng. Cuối cùng, điểm 8.5 cho hiệu suất của nhân viên cũng là một điểm đáng chú ý, cho thấy sự chuyên nghiệp và tận tâm của đội ngũ nhân viên trong việc đáp ứng nhu cầu và yêu cầu của khách hàng.

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text:
Từ trung tâm Hà Nội, chỉ mất khoảng hơn 1 giờ lái xe để đến đây, nên rất dễ dàng để đi. 
Ngoài ra, phòng ốc rộng rãi và sạch sẽ, hồ bơi cũng như các tiện nghi đều được giữ gìn sạch sẽ, nên gia đình có trẻ nhỏ có thể thoải mái tận hưởng! 
Buffet bữa sáng cũng có nhiều loại và rất ngon. 
Điểm đáng lo ngại là trong khuôn viên không có cửa hàng tiện lợi, vì vậy cần mang theo đồ ăn cho trẻ em và đồ ăn nhẹ cho người lớn. 
Lần này tôi đã ở trong tòa khách sạn, nhưng lần sau tôi muốn thử ở villa!
sample_comments.title: Nơi có thể dành thời gian thư giãn cùng gia đình.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for your kind feedback regarding your stay at Flamingo Đại Lải Resort. We are delighted to know that you continue to enjoy the spacious, comfortable environment and the luxury experience we strive to provide at a 5-star level.

Your continued trust and visits mean a great deal to us. We look forward to welcoming you back for many more relaxing stays in the future.

Sincerely,
Management Board
Flamingo Dai Lai Resort
sample_comments.room_type: Căn Hộ Hai Giường Đơn Bầu Trời Loại Sang 1 Phòng Ngủ

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: Cảnh đẹp, phòng ok

sample_comments.text: Resort rộng và đẹp. Phòng forest in the sky rộng thoáng, xung quanh là cây xanh rất fresh. Tủ lạnh lớn, bồn tắm đẹp và sạch sẽ, bể bơi cũng 10₫. Tuy nhiên vì bể bơi có bán vé cho khách không lưu trú nên một số khách tham quan ý thức sử dụng chưa được tốt làm ảnh hưởng đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng. Ít chỗ ăn, chỉ có nhà hàng bamboo thôi. Bù lại buffet sáng món ngon, view đỉnh. Ngồi ăn sáng và ngắm cảnh cũng đáng tiền rồi nha. Sẽ quay lại vào mùa thu.
sample_comments.title: Đáng tiền
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Thân gửi Quý khách,
Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách hàng đã tin tưởng lựa chọn Flamingo Đại Lải Resort làm điểm đến cho kỳ nghỉ lần này. Hy vọng rằng chúng tôi đã nỗ lực để làm cho kỳ nghỉ của Quý khách trở nên ý nghĩa và đặc biệt.
Kính chúc Quý khách luôn tràn ngập niềm vui và hạnh phúc. Hẹn gặp lại Quý khách trong kỳ nghỉ tiếp theo!
Trân trọng,
Ban Quản Lý
Flamingo Đại Lải Resort
sample_comments.room_type: Căn Hộ Hai Giường Đơn Bầu Trời Loại Sang 1 Phòng Ngủ

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Cảm ơn các bạn Mến, Luyến và Thảo đã nhiệt tình hỗ trợ

sample_comments.text: Mình đi nghỉ nhân kỉ niệm 1 năm ngày cưới và cảm thấy rất hài lòng với dịch vụ tại đây ạ. Phòng ốc sạch sẽ thoáng mát, các bạn nhân viên còn setup trang trí và tặng bánh kem. Đặc biệt là bạn *** và bạn *** hỗ trợ rất nhiệt tình. Mình sẽ còn quay lại
sample_comments.title: Nghi duong
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Thân gửi Quý khách,

Thay mặt toàn thể đội ngũ, tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn chân thành tới Quý khách đã chia sẻ những cảm xúc về kỹ nghỉ tại Flamingo Đại Lải Resort,
Chúng tôi rất hạnh phúc khi những giá trị về con người và sản phẩm dịch vụ mà đội ngũ luôn tâm huyết, mong muốn mang đến cho Quý khách những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ nhất đã phần nào được Quý khách công nhận và chia sẻ những điều đó đến với cộng đồng.
Cảm ơn Quý khách đã luôn lựa chọn Flamingo Đại Lải Resort, chúng tôi luôn hy vọng được chào đón Quý khách trong kỳ nghỉ gần nhất.

Trân trong!

Lê Bình Minh
Quản lý Tiền sảnh
Flamingo Đại Lải Resort
sample_comments.room_type: Căn Hộ Giường Lớn Bầu Trời Thủ Tướng 1 Phòng Ngủ

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Không gian yên tĩnh tiện nghi đẩy đủ, trải nghiệm rất hài lòng tại Flamingo được các bạn nhân viên rất nhiệt tình hỗ trợ từ A-Z cảm ơn các bạn Luyến, Hương, Lương đã giúp đỡ nhiệt tình

sample_comments.text: Đợt này đi cả gia đình, thời tiết khá tốt, may mắn có nhân viên tên Linh hỗ trợ đoàn rất nhiệt tình từ khi chưa check in đến khi rời khỏi. Biết gần ngày sinh nhật mẹ mình còn chuẩn bị cả quà bánh và mũ sinh nhật, hỗ trợ từ trước khi check in mặc dù đoàn có nhiều thay đổi về lịch trình. Khách sạn đáng ở, lần sau gia đình sẽ quay lại khi có dịp !
sample_comments.title: Thời tiết may mắn, nhân viên hỗ trợ nhiệt tình
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Thân gửi Quý khách,
Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách hàng đã tin tưởng lựa chọn Flamingo Đại Lải Resort làm điểm đến cho kỳ nghỉ lần này. Hy vọng rằng chúng tôi đã nỗ lực để làm cho kỳ nghỉ của Quý khách trở nên ý nghĩa và đặc biệt.
Kính chúc Quý khách luôn tràn ngập niềm vui và hạnh phúc. Hẹn gặp lại Quý khách trong kỳ nghỉ tiếp theo!
Trân trọng,
Ban Quản Lý
Flamingo Đại Lải Resort

sample_comments.title: TUYỆT VỜI~~
sample_comments.positives:
- Tiện ích khách sạn

DO NOT STAY HERE IF YOU ARE A WESTERNERS OR AN AUSSIE.

sample_comments.title: The worst resort in my life
sample_comments.text:
The worst hotel of my life.
We paid over 12,000,000 for this hotel. 

The sauna and jacuzzi in the room were not available 
None of the hotel staff was good at communicating in English.
I asked for an employee who could speak in English 
but They laughed and avoided talking to each other. 

Most of the services were not being provided. 
The bar on the 10th floor was closed, and no welcome drinks were provided.
The welcome fruit was only one type of fruit that could not be eaten.
All the restaurants were closed, so we ordered room service
They served a bad dish. 
I asked them to clean up after we finished eating
but They didn't clean up the dishes while we stayed in the accommodation.

It was the hotel we expected the most. but I experienced the worst. 
we just wasted time and money.
sample_comments.response:

We are very sorry that you and your family did not have a truly complete experience at Flamingo Dai Lai Resort. Best regards, Management Board of Flamingo Dai Lai resort

sample_comments.positives: Wow, what a wonderful surprise!! This property was so much better than we expected and we look forward to returning. sample_comments.negatives: The food at the Bamboo restaurant was disappointing especially as it's such an incredible ambiance. The staff were great though. Perhaps we ordered the wrong items but either way it left a negative experience but we'll try it again next visit in hopes of better quality (drinks hot, meat dry and overcooked,soup bland and made me sick that night).

but it became worst experience ever.
I took my best friend to the resort to stay with their family.

"Sir, May I book for bbq service for you for your booking?" If the Booking for BBQ is necessary.
and, In the room there was plenty of ants and mosquitos.

1. Poor service.

3. with expensive price.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives:
친절한 리셉션 직원들 덕분에 전반적으로 좋은 서비스를 경험했습니다. 특히 Linh의 세심한 배려에 깊은 감사를 표합니다. 투숙 전 발생한 여러 문제들을 자기 일처럼 적극적으로 해결해 주었으며, 머무는 동안에도 세심하게 신경 써준 덕분에 매우 편안한 시간을 보낼 수 있었습니다.
​다만, 리셉션 외 타 부서 직원들과의 소통에는 아쉬움이 남습니다. 저 역시 영어가 능숙하지 않으나, 최근에는 번역기 등을 활용해 충분히 소통할 수 있음에도 불구하고 대다수 직원이 소통에 소극적인 태도를 보였습니다. 이로 인해 발생하는 답답함과 소통의 부담이 오롯이 고객의 몫이 되었다는 점은 개선이 필요해 보입니다.
sample_comments.negatives:
설(Tet) 연휴 기간 리조트 내 주요 시설이 운영되지 않았음에도, 사전에 고지 받지 못해 
불편을 겪었습니다. 특히 운영되는 레스토랑이 단 한 곳뿐이라 2박 3일 내내 동일한 곳에서만 식사해야했기에 만족도가 많이 낮았습니다. 특히 파스타는 주문시마다 지나치게 불어있어서 알단테를 기대하기 어려웠으며, 간도 맞지 않았습니다. 일례로 '트러플 크림 페투치네'를 주문했을 때 메뉴 설명과 달리 스파게티 면으로 조리되어 나왔고, 트러플 향은 전혀 가미되어 있지 않았습니다. 직원분께 페투치네가 맞냐며 문의했을 때도 직원분은 뭐가 잘못 된 것인지 전혀 인지하지 못하는 것 같았습니다.
​객실 위생 상태 역시 실망스러웠습니다. 투숙 기간 내내 거실에서 정체불명의 비린내가 났으며, 욕실 상태도 청결하지 못하다는 느낌을 받았습니다. 그리고 객실 내부에서 개미가 지속적으로 나타나는 불편함도 있었습니다.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful location but disappointing experience
sample_comments.text:
The resort location is nice, but overall my stay was disappointing. It feels mainly aimed at domestic guests, and as a foreign visitor I didn't feel very welcomed. Even the front desk staff had limited English. Some facilities (like the pink castle and Lala Park) felt artificial and didn't match the natural surroundings.
The property is clean in visible areas, but because it's so large, some parts are not well maintained. Noise was a problem --- nearby villas played loud music, and the check-in area was crowded and chaotic with no clear lines.
Great potential, but needs better service for international guests, more consistent maintenance, and better noise control.
sample_comments.response: Dear Valued Guest, Thank you for choosing Flamingo Đại Lải Resort for your recent getaway. We truly appreciate the time you took to share your experience with us. We are genuinely sorry to learn that your stay at our resort did not fully meet your expectations. With a sincere spirit of improvement and a strong commitment to delivering the best possible service, we truly hope to have the opportunity to welcome you and your family back in the future for a more fulfilling and memorable stay. Wishing you and your loved ones good health, happiness, and joy. Sincerely, Board of Manager Flamingo Dai Lai Resort.

sample_comments.title: Shocking service and worst food in Asia.
sample_comments.text: From the website this place looked great, the reality is unfortunately far from. Upon checking in we were provided with a list of numbers to call to access the "multitude of services" on offer, but as none actually worked we, very frustratingly, had to call a largely non English speaking switch board to ask for anything we needed during our stay. We waited 2 hours for room service, which when it arrived was without doubt the worst food I have had in Asia in 5 years. The free breakfast was likewise inedible and served in a dinning room in virtual darkness (perhaps not an accident, given the quality).No food available at the pool bar and the restaurant menu was the same as the room service (which had almost killed us the night before). The Resort itself is poorly designed, half built and too big to be relaxing - going anywhere involves calling a golf caddy. If looking for a weekend break I would avoid the Flamingo - unless of course, your aim is to loose weight via stress and starvation.

sample_comments.title: Ghost hotel, not for non-Vietnamese
sample_comments.text:
We went from Tuesday to Thursday and everything was empty, closed and looking like an abandoned site. The place is massive, looks like a cruise on land (even has a casino) but everything looks old and almost like abandoned.
The Vila it self was really nice, spacious and full of vegetation, really nice and peaceful. 
Food was terrible, and stuff did not talk a word of English which usually is fine with Google Translate but they would just laugh, talk to each other and not give us an answer.
I think this is a resort made for the elderly locals.
If you want to be in isolation on your nice Vila and don't care about food then go for it, otherwise I wouldn't recommend this place.
sample_comments.response: Xin chào! Dear Valued Guest. We apologize for your experience at the restaurant not meeting your expectations. We regret that, during your visit, the service was not as complete and attentive as it should have been. We have taken note of your feedback and will share it with our team to further improve in the future. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome and serve you better next time.

sample_comments.text: I just wanna share that, the Staff in there not nice, my husband lost his card holder and we only realized it when we arrived the hotel. So sad that our simcard only can use 3G not calling ( I know that it also my mistake). That why I come to receptionist desk and ask for a call to airport. However, one staff there immediately said to the receptionist (I guessed , that person is floor manager) : "Who allows that? who will pay for that call? Do you pay for that?". I felt so sock and sad that why the big resort like Flamingo can't support us?? I thought it is just a call and if it cost money, I believed they can talk to me and I willing to pay anyway as I need that call urgently.

Ăn tối tại nhà hàng Thơ ăn lẩu chưa ngon.

sample_comments.title: Room not as advertised, poor communication, overpriced and overcrowded
sample_comments.text: We had a bad experience here and it was disappointing given what a beautiful resort this clearly could be, if only it had better management and better communication with guests. After a multistage check-in where staff appeared not well trained to handle multiple guests, we were assigned our room. It was not the room we paid for. Our beautiful Lakeview villa (and the ones we saw did look stunning), was apparently unavailable due to overnight rain. At no point until we arrived and called the reception from our apparent new room was it explained to us that our room had been 'upgraded' from a stunning Lakeview room of 300sqm to a 150sqm Forest villa overlooking a garbage bin and fence. Sure, it had another bedroom but it was demonstarably not an upgrade in size or location. We were not offered another room and our request for a full or partial refund was refused. Had we not had young kids tired from travel we would have left straight away. They need more customer-oriented management.

sample_comments.title: Not equipped to operate during a pandemic as of Feb 2021
sample_comments.text: Usually, for a resort at this price point, you can't expect much, that's true. But when you keep your business open during a pandemic, please do expect that guests would start pay attention to things. Flamingo's restaurants, in short, are not equipped to operate during a pandemic, and their staff are not trained to do so. Over the breakfast buffet, we still observed chefs making ready-to-eat food without their masks properly worn (noses not covered) and their all-you-can-eat buffet are served the way it's always served pre-COVID: All guests sharing spoons and tongs to serve their own food. And when we left our table after the meals, staff did not do a proper job cleaning the table for the next guests. They really should have emptied out the tables and use a disinfectant on al the surfaces, but neither is done here. The exact same thing happens at the a-la-carte restaurant. So eating out at the resort is definitely not recommended. And when it comes to room service, the effort put into the food is laughable, and quality is non-existent even though it is one of the most overpriced room service I've ever seen anywhere in the world. Sure, staying in your own villa is probably the safest way to travel in a pandemic, just remember to bring your own food, and refrain from using housekeeping services also, because that's literally strangers coming into your room touching everything. So what's my recommendation? Stay home. And only come here when we have this pandemic under absolute control. That's the responsible thing to do.

sample_comments.title: Checkin and checkout experience is terrible
sample_comments.text:
Front desk did not pay attention to us when we were standing at the counter at all. After like 30mins, we had to ask them when it would be our turn for checking in, and the front office staff asked us and other guests standing in the line next to us "who was there first?". Are we supposed to know this? Supervising who's there first? Even though it's supposed to be front desk job to guide the guests? Then they told us that we were standing in the wrong line and asked us to move to other counter. If we were standing in the wrong line, why didn't they say anything in the first place? Why just then when I asked? Why ignoring us?
So we moved to other counter and wait in line for another 30mins, then the previous FO staff asked us to return to the previous desk, stand in the previous line that they said was wrong before. And checked us in. But the horrible experience did not stop there. We booked Lake View premium Villa, and they said the rooms had been overbooked so we will be staying in the hotel room. They said it was all Agoda fault as they had already run out the room type and didn't know why Agoda still had the inventory to sell... Took us another 1hour for them to find other alternative.
Checking out also took 1 hour. We lined in, they collect all of the key card (before the checking out process). When it's our turn to check out, they said Housekeeping hasn't returned minibar check of our room with Front desk so they couldn't do the process for us yet. And told us to continue to wait until later (at that point we had already wait for 1 hour, and when we left our room, HSK already checked our room). So we had to tell them our room had already been checked one hour before when we left. Only then did they contact their Housekeeping for our room status and checked us out...

The facilities are ok, but these checkin and checkout experience totally ruin the stay for us. They had a 5 star facility, they should have better front office/operating team.

sample_comments.title: Not every aspect was 5-stars

Guests have to constantly call for buggy services to go to each different location. So, you'd have to have a well-charged mobile phone always. So that's a little troublesome at times.
We stayed at a villa , and apparently only 2 bottles of water was complementary. The rest were charged at 24,000d per 500m bottle! We are a family of 7 people and the tap water is not suitable for consumption. Moreover, when we checked in, we were not told that only 2 were free. How shocked we were when the bill came! I expected a 5 star resort to at least provide free drinking water. 

Other than the lobby receptionists, most of the staff do not speak English. Most of them were polite though. 

At the warm swimming pool, I felt a little uncomfortable as the staff there would stare at us with an unfriendly look.

The buggy services, though, were great. The men who drove it were patient, and always greeted us with a smile.

The villa where we stayed at was kept clean, and lemongrass essential oils made the place smell like a big spa experience. So we liked the rooms/villa.

Finally, as a family with young kids, the outdoor playground that was available was very old and some equipment were dangerous. I had expected a newer, safer playground for a 5 star resort.

sample_comments.title: High quality resort if in the right season. Very good villas but staff pushing for good reviews.
sample_comments.positives:
The resort is nicely decorated, very well located and gives a unique feeling of being in a luxurious jungle. The entire building is filled with trees and plants which was stunning. There are a great variety of villas, and all of them looked very well taken care of. There were many enormous villas which were very nice to look at. We had a forest villa which was very nice, nothing to complain about there. Good beds, cozy terrace with furniture and an outdoor shower with warm water. We were located by the lake so it was amazing to wake up there each morning. Bikes provided free of charge and buggy transport to and from villa to main hotel or wherever, available at all times within 10 minutes and cost free as well. Very good breakfast 10/10. Very nice staff. Scooter rental available to explore the whole resort. Warm pool with plenty of space around. 

We decided to have dinner in our villa the last day so we ordered several courses and dishes from the room service menu, as well as some bottles of wine. This was very good and was not too expensive.

The on site spa was absolutely amazing. We had a total of 6 hours there with all kinds of treatments and this was of high quality with experienced therapists. The Korean saunas were a new and nice experience. The jacuzzi and regular saunas were also nice but male and female can't be together there so don't go if you're a couple and would like to experience it together.
sample_comments.negatives:
Our expectations were quite high upon arrival due to the fact that it's a 5 start resort and spa. There are many restaurants and bars to chose from with different pools and many other facilities that live up to the standards of a 5 star resort. However, during our stay everything was closed and only 1 below average restaurant was open. All the bars were closed except the one outside by the main pool, but since it was very cold this wasn't even an option. They had a very nice bar by the hotel lobby so we didn't understand why that one wasn't open instead of the one outside... There was supposedly a sky bar on the top floor but we were given different information from different staff about this. Some said it was closed, some said it was open, some said it was an outdoor bar but when we checked it out (you have to go up to the top floor when using the bathroom in the restaurant) it was definitely closed and an indoor bar. And why it was closed we don't know, very confusing. But there were no indoor bars open during our stay which was very strange for a 5 star resort.

The restaurant was ok but the steak was very chewy. Very annoying to only have 1 option out of the 5 or so restaurants on site and that option not being so good. We discovered later that there was almost no one here since we were alone at the only open restaurant which is where breakfast is served too, and we were alone there too... So we decided to opt for getting food delivered to our villa via the room service which turned out to be very good. However it was not the same menu as the only restaurant open so it was also confusing, but we ordered a good meal with some wine and that was actually very good.

Another thing we have to mention is the begging for positive reviews. At the restaurant we were given a paper form to give the restaurant feedback and the staff was hanging over my shoulder watching.

sample_comments.title: Typically frustrating Vietnamese-run hotel chain experience
sample_comments.positives: The location, gardening and interiors are very good. The facilities, especially the pool are adequate. Breakfast is quite good.
sample_comments.negatives:
Whilst the facilities look 5 star, the experience is much, much lower standard. Everything is restricted, monitored, inflexible, tense and somewhat joyless. You get told off by pool attendants if you have not checked in at the poolside to be tagged like a prisoner, the dinner options are hotpot or.... hotpot. (How does a vegetarian feel about having a pile of raw meat put in front of them without any warning?) you are half- or full-board you have to pay extra for water. (The kids were given fries, but that was also the only kids' option at lunch, at an addional cost, of course.) After 1 hour at dinner, with it clearly evident that I wasn't going to eat the hotpot that had been placed on the table, the staff suggested the room service menu, so I signed the bill for my water and left. 

You have to ask multiple times to get the wifi turned on in the room. The room has a kitchen but has nothing in it (not even a basic minibar set). On a Thursday evening half of the food/drink options are closed, including those that are potentially most attractive, off of the central lobby. 

The issue, as ever, is a management issue. The managers train the staff to exercise discipline, efficiency and conformity to rules as a way of running a hotel. Rather than a focus on guest experience. So, at check out they do not ask whether enjoyed your stay: there's no rule to check so nothing is said. 

I continue to strongly advise western visitors to avoid these large Vietnamese chain hotels. They never change. I occasionally give them another try but, oh boy, I am taking one for the team....

sample_comments.positives: Beautiful location and grounds. Mix of good and rubbish, which is typical of Vietnamese owned hotels I understand. The hotel claims to be of international standards but this is not so. Appalling meal in Bamboo Restaurant, warm wine, served half way through dinner where food arrived all together. No staff training or English spoken. More interested in clearing tables away then providing a customer service. Having said that, excellent and professional service in another restaurant on site the following day. Front of house staff excellent and a credit, big shoutout to Anh. A real mix bag of experiences.
sample_comments.negatives: More staff training. If you are calling yourself an internationally acclaimed hotel, don't just cater for the local market.

sample_comments.title: A place worth considering for a second visit.
sample_comments.text:
I visited a resort for the first time with my children to celebrate the holiday, and I was a bit disappointed, perhaps because I had high expectations.

1. Guest Room.
- The ceiling-mounted shower in the bathroom wasn't properly secured, so it wobbled around, making me fearful of hitting my head while showering.
- The hand shower had a loose angle adjustment, so when I tried to set the angle, the water pressure caused the showerhead to tilt, and I had to use a toothbrush to prop it up and use it.

2. Lack of information about resort facilities.
- After arriving at the resort, it was not easy to find information about the resort buildings and surrounding facilities. Bamboo Restaurant (paid - 500,000 VND if using a room), the restaurant used for breakfast (free), Kids Club (very small and poorly managed), arcade (lack of content suitable for children), hot water pool (not warm, felt lukewarm and chilly).

I felt that the price for one night was not worth it.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Dear Valued Guest,

First of all, we would like to sincerely thank you for choosing Flamingo Dai Lai Resort for your Lunar New Year holiday with your family and for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We truly appreciate your honest comments.

We are very sorry for the inconvenience caused by the shower system in your bathroom as well as the lack of clear information regarding the resort's facilities. Our Engineering and Operations teams have been instructed to immediately inspect, review, and improve these matters to ensure safety and enhance our guests' experience.

Regarding the restaurant, Kids Club, game area, and heated swimming pool, we have carefully noted your comments and will continue upgrading our services to better reflect the room rate. We fully understand that the price should be aligned with the value and experience delivered, and your feedback is an important basis for us to review and improve our service quality, especially during peak seasons.

sample_comments.title: Not recommended during the off-season.
sample_comments.text: Room service food is excellent. The lobby staff don't speak English, so use Papago. At the end of October, the weather is early autumn, making it hard to use the pool (it's too cold. It wasn't a heated pool. It seems like it should get colder). Perhaps because it's off-peak season and I visited on a weekday, the high-floor restaurant is closed except when the breakfast place is open. If the local food doesn't suit you, room service is the answer. The room condition is very good and clean (however, there is no "do not disturb," so even if you don't want it, they come in to clean). When you call for a buggy, they come right away. It's nice to walk around since the area is spacious. Not all rooms have balconies, so you must check if the room has a balcony before booking. Even if it looks like there's a balcony in the pictures, it may not be a usable balcony but rather a flowerbed.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for choosing Flamingo Đại Lải Resort for your recent getaway. We truly appreciate the time you took to share your experience with us.

We are genuinely sorry to learn that your stay at our resort did not fully meet your expectations. With a sincere spirit of improvement and a strong commitment to delivering the best possible service, we truly hope to have the opportunity to welcome you and your family back in the future for a more fulfilling and memorable stay.

Wishing you and your loved ones good health, happiness, and joy.

Sincerely,
Board of Manager Flamingo Dai Lai Resort.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: I almost canceled the reservation. A day before I ahead to the resort, I called to find out what I have to prepare and the resort personnel said that I need to bring the certification of vaccination. But when I got to the gate of the resort my wife and I were not admitted because they required PCR test. Thus, we got PCR test at local clinic. We were accepted to the resort after 6hours.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr Simon
Thank you for your honest feedback, we appreciate all critiques as it greatly assists us in our commitment to constant improvement. 
Although thegovernment requirements has already been specified on Booking.com, but we acknowledge that we could do better, there should have been more clear communication by our management and staff of our online booking regulation and government requirements to strengthen epidemic prevention. The Resort considers this time period to be the busiest and most difficult of the year because of Covid 19, however we still strive to ensure all amenities are available to our guests.
Moving forward, we will proceed to add more information to make it easier for customers to recognize. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back in the near future. 
Best Regards, 
Flamingo Dai Lai Resort.

This was our second to Flamingo resort and bring our family from Taiwan to have short holiday there. We were giving some feedback last time but seems they are not really like to improve. 

About the service:
When we called from the room to the reception, they would just hang up the phone if they don't understand me in English and no one did call back either. 
The receptionist were giving us a lot the wrong information and directions. At the last day we checked out, we were been told there are 2 cups missing in the with no reason. The baby cot was hard for baby to sleep so that we had to sleep with my son in our bed for 2 nights.

About the facilities:
They do have a lot good idea to entertain the kids and we appreciated. The staff there were friendly and helpful. That's the reason why went back again. 

Our villa were not clean as what we expected since we found a lot the ant anddust in the room.

sample_comments.title: Really nice area but service felt like Police style,
sample_comments.text:
The surroundings are very nice & large - it's really nice when you come from Hanoi.
Villa was ok. Cleanliness average & it lacks of amenities like glasses/cup/plates/cutlery - it's so strange to rent a villa with big empty kitchen. 
We prearranged private dinner at Villa - dinner was really good & chef took care of us so well, we didn't have any service staff to support, they setup & disappeared,
Breakfast is chaos (as usually is in large hotels in VN) but the welcome staff acted like a police woman on the hunt for "room key" no hello/thankyou/please & once she swiped our key she pointed to restaurant for us to enter & fight for ourselves in finding a table,... inside the restaurant, more staff to clear & reset tables was needed & should maintain cleanliness of toilets too!!! 
Breakfast food was ok.

The overall interactions with staff always felt we were dealing w police or controllers who worried we were cheating. I understand the need to control entries to resort & restaurants but I think it can be done better - use AI & face recognition tools like vinpearl, have better advanced communication with guests in what to prepare & what to register in advance. And finally, change staff mindset that guests are the one who pay your salary so smile & treat us well,

Loved the place,
Not sure we will be back purely because the service level didn't match the high price we paid...
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a detailed review following your stay with us.

First of all, we are truly pleased to know that you enjoyed the natural surroundings and found the private dinner experience memorable. Your kind words about our chef are sincerely appreciated and will certainly be shared with the team.

However, we are genuinely sorry to learn that several aspects of your stay did not meet your expectations, particularly regarding service attitude and overall guest experience. Please allow us to express our sincere apologies for the discomfort you felt.

Your feedback regarding the villa amenities has been carefully noted. We understand how important it is for a villa---especially one with a full kitchen---to be properly equipped, and we will review this internally to ensure a more complete and convenient setup for future guests.

We are especially concerned to hear about your experience during breakfast. The manner in which

sample_comments.text: I book a 4 bedroom villa 1month in advance. But I go with other 3 families and a bunch of kids so, I have to take it. Dispite the dirt part, the villa is briliant. The view and the pool is perfect, and I love the back yard. sample_comments.title: Good choice for a family holiday
sample_comments.text:
My family had a pleasant stay here. 
The room was big and beautiful. 
Bathroom facilities were new and clean but the bathroom heating light was not in use, making the room too cold for such a winter day. 
There were free of charge bycicles and electric cars which were a bonus point.
However, the check-in service was too slow. It took me roughly 10-15 mintues to wait for my turn although there were only 3 guests at the time. The receptionist made mistakes while dealing with both my check-in and another's. 
The restaurants were very beautiful, the service was fast but the food was boring, poorly-presented. The breakfast buffet was very poor too. The crab hot pot was good.
sample_comments.positives: Good location: only 40km from Hanoi, suitable for families with babies who can't travel a long distance. Extremely friendly staff who are willing to serve your requests. Huge place for cycling.

sample_comments.title: Value for money, especially for weekday trip
sample_comments.text:
My stay was exceptional. The only drawback is there's not a lot of choice when it comes to dining. You can either choose the restaurants in the resort which are quite pricey as they are fine dining, or you can choose the ones outside - Phu Quy, Huong Viet, etc. whose food is quite good, but cleanliness and hygiene may be questionable for expats.

Everything else is perfect. Also, it should be noted that this is about properties managed by Flamingo themselves, not the private-owned ones. You may have different experience with those since there are differences in terms of service scope.

sample_comments.title: It's great for a budget-friendly hotel stay.
sample_comments.text: The staff was friendly, but their English was really not good. There were times when simple conversational words didn't get through. Still, the staff tried hard to help in any way they could, and body language resolved most issues. I stayed in a private villa, and the resort is spacious, so we used a buggy to get around. The buggies arrive quickly when called. The restaurant caters to local tastes, but if you're not sensitive to flavors, you might find it delicious. It was a bit disappointing that there were lots of bugs in the private villa. I think it would have been nice to just stay at the resort. It was a great value for a hotel vacation. I recommend it!
sample_comments.response:
Dear our value guest,
Thank you so much for chosing Flamingo Dai Lai as your vacation and give us a sweet review. We hope to see you next time! 
Best regards, 
Flamingo Dai Lai resort

sample_comments.title: Remote Paradise!
sample_comments.text:
It's 30-40 mins drive away from Hanoi Airpot head north.
They have a shuttle bus from & to Hanoi for free.
The place is out of my expectation, with such price could be considered as outstanding.
Food is a little bit pricy but acceptable when you have not much choices, and the staff an hardly communicate in English though they are all helpful and friendly.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr/ Ms, 
Greetings from Flamingo Resort!
Thank you for having chosen us as your vacation destination.
We would like to send you a big "Thank" with your compliment. It's very huge motivation for us.
Your happy is our happy, too!
We thank you very much once again and value your comment and support and look forward to another opportunity to host you at our Flamingo Dai Lai Resort.
Kind regards,

sample_comments.title: It was a nice place to visit, the place was very clean, the food was good. Overall, worth the money.
sample_comments.text: We came as a family and this resort is perfect if you're looking for a place to relax and enjoy the facility. However, the staffs could have been better; the drivers were not engaged when we asked them to take us around for a visit and the waiters at the Poem restaurant were a little too passive. We booked a villa to stay and it came with a kitchen, however, there were no cutleries, utensils or dishes available. The resort also didn't offer to sell us meat if we wanted a barbecue so we were a little disappointed but it was our fault to not have done the research. The room also came with a jacuzzi and a sauna, however the hotel said they disallowed the clients to use them. The breakfast restaurant, Poem, we were expecting the food to be better in terms of both quality and quantity. The Bamboo restaurant, on the other hand, was worth its price. The design is beautiful, the decoration is very cozy and the food is delicious, the staffs there were very helpful as well.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr/ Ms, 
Greetings from Flamingo Resort!
Thank you for having chosen us as your vacation destination.
Your feedback is very well appreciated and we will immediately conduct retraining for our team for proper service. We hope that you will come back in next time and we will have chance for take care you!
Kind regards,

Before leaving, Ms. Lan even came out to the door to say goodbye. Thank you to the reception team, and I hope to see you again!

sample_comments.title: Mostly hits with some misses
sample_comments.text:
Found this resort about an hour's drive from Hanoi. Mainly for locals with the occasional tourists, and many groups when we were there. So go early for breakfast for example.
Many facilities were closed, such as the Piano Bar and Night Shopping Street. 
Highlight for us was the 4 bedroom villa, which was huge and clean. Sad part was the in-villa sauna which was disabled for safety reasons. Also strange that there were no cutlery and cooking utensils available in the kitchen, guess the resort wants you to spend money in their restaurants.

We had an in-villa BBQ organised as well, but you will have to grill yourself. Ask for the staff to spray ample insect repellent else you are dinner for the mozzies.

Food in the restaurants were nice though. 

The room supervisor Thanh was very nice and helpful too.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!

At Flamingo, we continuously strive every day to bring the highest level of satisfaction to our guests, with the aim of delivering exceptional and memorable experiences to each and every visitor.

sample_comments.title: 2-room full villa
sample_comments.text: I live in Hanoi, Vietnam, and while looking for a nearby place, I found that due to the holiday, the price exceeded 1.1 million dong per night, but I am satisfied. It takes about an hour from Miding (Korean Town), and I quickly arranged transportation using Xanh SM both to and from the location. Breakfast and dinner were included, and both meals were at the POEM restaurant; however, dinner did not suit my taste, and I had to buy drinks (watermelon juice, orange juice) separately. Breakfast was fine, and the pho was delicious. The accommodation was spacious (for 2 adults and 2 children), and the pool was cleaner and better than expected. I would consider going again if the price were more affordable. I would appreciate it if Agoda could distinguish between resort accommodations and privately-owned villas.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Dear Valued Guest,

We would like to sincerely thank you for choosing Flamingo Dai Lai Resort as your vacation destination. We hope that we have made every effort to make your vacation meaningful and special.

In addition, we are grateful for your comments. With our eagerness to learn and always wanting to bring customers the best experiences, we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you and your family in the upcoming vacations when you have the opportunity to return here.
Furthermore, your reservation is under Flamingo's management, the 2-bedroom villa.
We wish you and your family good health and happiness.

Sincerely,

Board of Manager Flamingo Dai Lai Resort.

sample_comments.title: Where I met the kind staff of my life.
sample_comments.text: During this trip, I stayed in 7 different accommodations while living in Vietnam for a month. I have visited many areas from Hanoi to Phu Quoc. I have explored many tourist attractions and the best accommodations in Vietnam. I booked this place to play golf and relax. I didn't correct the typo in my name during the booking process, but there is a policy here that states the name must match that of the primary booker on Agoda. (Usually, if you just show your reservation number, they handle it flexibly, which is why I didn't correct the name.) I am not good at English, so communication was not smooth, yet the staff's determination to help me until the end was very touching. They mentioned there would be a fee to change the name, but I thought her kindness was worth the fee, and I received a lot of help from her during my stay. Thank you, LUONG THI MEN. Because of you, I could have a happy trip^^
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Dear our valued Guest,

Thank you so much for sharing your impressions after your recent stay at Flamingo Dai Lai Resort.
We highly appreciate your nice words about your fantastic experience. 
Meeting the needs of our guests and knowing they have enjoyed their stays are our greatest rewards. Rest assured that we will certainly share your generous words of praise with the whole team.
Once again thank you very much - we are looking forward to your next visit with your family.

Warm regards,
Board of Manager Flamingo Dai Lai Resort

sample_comments.title: Quiet and green area not too far from Hanoi
sample_comments.text: Good value for money. Good room size. Decent equipment though a bit worn out. Hot water is not redundant - wonder why. But love the outdoor shower. Very good breakfast. Skybar restaurant is great for out door dinner on the 10th floor of the hotel building. There is a supposedly lovely hot pool but I didn't have time to enjoy as it's far from the villas area. Will definitely come back some other weekend after golf as usual
sample_comments.response:

We highly appreciate your nice word about our good service and atmosphere.
Once again thank you very much, we are looking forward to your next visit to Flamingo with your family.

Warm regards,
Board of manager Flamingo Dai Lai Resort

sample_comments.title: A good hotel with a lot of untapped potential.
sample_comments.text: The campus is extremely beautiful, very suitable for a "healing" type of vacation, but this time I am on a short business trip so I haven't had the chance to fully enjoy the fresh air here. The biggest downside is that the evenings here are a bit dull, with few amenities - probably because of low demand. The breakfast is okay, so it's advisable to book a room with breakfast included.

sample_comments.title: Enjoy a relaxing time in the forest.
sample_comments.text:
Compared to the bustling and polluted streets of Hanoi, this resort offers beautiful scenery in the woods and fresh air. 

The breakfast was also better than that of general hotels in downtown Hanoi. Additionally, if you choose the package that includes dinner, you can enjoy a meal at the Bamboo Restaurant without worrying about dinner.

It offers great value for money, and the accommodation facilities are satisfying. I recommend it if you dream of living in a spacious forest setting.

sample_comments.title: Fabulous getaway close to Hanoi!
sample_comments.text: We stayed during the week and had an amazing experience! The room was beautiful and we had the beach and all the activities to ourselves. It was amazing to only go an hour from Hanoi and be in a lush green mountainous area where we could see hundreds of stars at night. We were a family of four. My husband and I were on the king bed, one son on the mattress/couch provided and we brought a little blow up bed for our other son and there was still plenty of room. Be careful if you have really young children as the pool is right outside your door and there is no fence around it. The food was ok, but I was happy we brought plenty of snacks. The bathroom was amazing, we loved the 2nd outdoor shower, as they also had an indoor one if that's more your thing. We had fun at the beach and just hanging around the villa. The level of English for a lot of the staff is not that great so be prepared to be patient or bring a dictionary, remember you are still in Vietnam, even if it feels like you have stepped into a whole different world!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
Vì thái độ và cách xử lý của nhân viên và quản lý nên không nỡ cho 2 sao, nhưng quả thực không chịu được mùi hắc, mong khách sạn cải thiện để nếu lần sau ghé tới sẽ có trải nghiệm tốt hơn.
Mình vào trúng phòng mùi quá hắc, tới mức đau đầu phát bực. Đặt 3 phòng thì 2 phòng hắc trung bình (hoặc chưa ở lâu tới lúc hắc nồng nặc, nhưng mọi người vẫn trụ lại phòng vì không muốn gây phiền toái), và 1 phòng mùi hắc cực điểm (là phòng mình). Dù mở cửa phòng rất lâu, liên lạc lễ tân thì mãi mới có 1 bạn bên buồng phòng mang máy tinh dầu lên, định lấy mùi này át đi mùi khác nhưng không thể dứt điểm vấn đề đau đầu được. Sau đó bạn này lại không báo lại gì, nên mãi không thấy xử lý, gọi lại lễ tân lại không nắm được tình hình. 
Cứ thế mấy tiếng đồng hồ đẩy xe em bé vật vờ ở tầng 1. Không thể đợi được nữa, đưa bé lớn đi bơi thì tầm 5-6h chiều được chuyển sang phòng khác. Dù bên buồng phòng đã lau sàn tường để bay mùi nhưng khi vào rồi đóng kín bật điều hoà thì lại nhức đầu inh ỏi.
Dù các bạn đã cố gắng giải quyết, nhưng quy chuẩn của khách sạn là phải hắc như vậy nên khi gặp vấn đề này lần đầu, lúng túng là điều không tránh khỏi.
Thông cảm là vậy, nhưng đêm ngày 2 vẫn vừa ôm đầu vừa bịt mũi ...
Còn lại những thứ khác thì rất ok. Tiếc vì đến lúc về không thấy bạn bell staff và 1 bạn lái xe điện (không giục giã, nhiệt tình giúp đỡ cụ già xuống cầu thang) để tip vì lúc muốn tip lại không có ví.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào,
Thân gửi Quý khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn Flamingo Đại Lải Resort làm điểm đến nghỉ dưỡng. Chúng tôi rất trân trọng và cảm kích khi Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những cảm nhận về kỳ nghỉ vừa qua.
Chúng tôi rất hạnh phúc khi những giá trị về con người đặc biệt là các bạn bell staff và lái xe điện, mà đội ngũ luôn tâm huyết, mong muốn mang đến cho Quý khách những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ nhất đã phần nào được Quý khách công nhận và chia sẻ những điều đó đến với cộng đồng. Chúng tôi chắc chắn sẽ chuyển lời động viên này tới các bạn như một sự khích lệ rất lớn.
Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi thực sự xin lỗi vì tình trạng mùi trong phòng đã ảnh hưởng nghiêm trọng đến sự thoải mái và sức khỏe của Quý khách cũng như gia đình, đặc biệt khi có trẻ nhỏ và người lớn tuổi đi cùng. Chúng tôi rất tiếc vì quá trình xử lý ban đầu còn chậm, thiếu sự phối hợp xuyên suốt giữa các bộ phận khiến Quý khách phải chờ đợi và bất tiện trong nhiều giờ đồng hồ.
Những phản hồi của Quý khách là điều ch

sample_comments.title: Amazing and comfortable, with a few notes to keep in mind.
sample_comments.text:
I'll give my two criticisms first. One, few of the staff speak enough English to answer questions like asking where do I need to go, or how the Jjimjilbang works, etc. This caused me a lot of confusion and I missed out on some of the stuff I paid for. Only one employee took her phone and tried with google translate to communicate, the rest basically waved me off.

Second is the buggies. They're fantastic if you're trying to move from one main area somewhere else, but if you're in your room, be prepared to wait. After waiting an hour for a buggy (and 3 calls to check in and get told just 5 minutes away), I just decided to walk, and managed to catch a buggy on the way. 

Everything else is absolutely breathtaking. It's an amazing place away from the world with wonderful views, things to do, incredible food (though the restaurant didn't let me charge to my room which was strange), it's all wonderful. If you're looking for true peace and quiet though this may not be the best place, as there are hundreds of children running around. Very family friendly with lots of things for kids to do, swimming pools and activities, so you'll see a lot.

I would love to come back, maybe not in the middle of summer next time, but everything else was really wonderful!

We stil drove to the city most days and the front desk was able to schedule a taxi every time we needed one. Le duc thien was a very great host and treated us Americans who cannot speak any Vietnamese with respect and helpfulnes at any time of day.

Flamingo Dai Lai Resort.

sample_comments.title: Worth the money
sample_comments.text: The resort is spacious and beautiful. The "forest in the sky" room is airy, surrounded by fresh greenery. It has a large fridge, a beautiful and clean bathtub, and the pool is also 10₫. However, since the pool sells tickets to non-staying guests, some visitors do not use the facilities responsibly, which affects the relaxation experience. There are few dining options, only the bamboo restaurant. On the plus side, the breakfast buffet is delicious with a great view. Sitting down for breakfast and enjoying the scenery is worth the money. I will return in the fall.
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.title: A place where the family can spend time leisurely.
sample_comments.text: It's easy to go there since it's just a little over an hour by car from the center of Hanoi. Also, the rooms are spacious and clean, and the pool and facilities are well-kept, making it enjoyable and reassuring for families with children! The breakfast buffet had a wide variety of options and was delicious. One concern is that there is no convenience store on the premises, so you need to bring snacks for the kids and light meals for adults in advance. This time I stayed in the hotel building, but I would like to try staying in a villa next time!

sample_comments.title: Lovely
sample_comments.text: This is my second time returning to Flamingo Dai Lai. Before check-in, Thao, the receptionist, greeted me and provided enthusiastic guidance, making my arrival and check-in at the resort very smooth and trouble-free. Upon arrival, I was warmly welcomed by the staff; Men and Minh's professional attitude and smiles made me feel right at home. The hotel's facilities are excellent, the surrounding atmosphere is cool and refreshing, and the abundance of greenery creates a very comfortable feeling for a relaxing vacation. I visited during the off-season, so it was very quiet and peaceful. I encountered a slight problem in the evening, but staff member Lan and Bich Thao provided quick and enthusiastic assistance. I love this place and will return frequently. I will recommend it to my friends and family. Thank you Flamingo for giving me a wonderful vacation.

sample_comments.title: Good travel experience
sample_comments.text: I'm getting ready to head back home, so I thought I'd come here to relax and get close to nature. The room location is great and the scenery is beautiful. I also really appreciate the reception staff: Mến for her patient explanations and warm service. It was a wonderful experience.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Dear Valued Guest,

We would like to sincerely thank you for choosing Flamingo Dai Lai Resort as your vacation destination. We hope that we have made every effort to make your vacation meaningful and special.

In addition, we are grateful for your comments. With our eagerness to learn and always wanting to bring customers the best experiences, we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you and your family in the upcoming vacations when you have the opportunity to return here.
We wish you and your family good health and happiness.

Sincerely,

Board of Management Flamingo Dai Lai Resort.

sample_comments.title: A suitable resort for all types of guests.
sample_comments.text:
I just finished a 3-day, 2-night vacation at Flamingo Dai Lai accompanied by my friend Khải.

I went on vacation with my husband, so I chose the Hill Top villa. It's a lovely little villa, quite private and suitable for couples. However, I think I would prefer the Forest Villa for the view.

The room space is spacious and fully equipped. I went during winter and was worried about the cold, but the resort even installed heating lamps.

Since I booked a villa managed by Flamingo, I also enjoyed many accompanying perks: free entrance tickets, free use of all types of swimming pools, electric cars, gym, etc., including hot tub/sauna sessions (I got 2 sessions in 2 days :D happy). Additionally, there was a 20% discount for services like the spa... In general, there were a lot of perks; when you check in, the reception will give you a sheet with all the information. I heard that even though it's also a Hill Top villa, if you book a villa managed by a private owner, it might be hit or miss on whether there are accompanying amenities - basically, people only rent that villa, and there's nothing else, but the price will be super cheap, so everyone should keep that in mind when booking.

Regarding activities, Flamingo has developed a lot since the last time I went (in 2019). I spent a whole day participating in activities such as: grass sliding, zoo, exploring Flamingo, ice cream castle, chocolate museum, playing arcade games, spa... In general, 3 days and 2 nights are not enough for everyone to explore all the activities here, so I will save some for next time hehehe.

sample_comments.title: Tuyet voi
sample_comments.text: Giá tốt, đã bao gồm ăn sáng và ăn tối. Buffet sáng vừa đủ món, nếu có thêm option chay thì sẽ tốt hơn; bữa tối set menu nhiều món, ăn rất thoải mái. Dịch vụ tốt, chăm sóc khách hàng chu đáo, bạn Hương DVKH thường xuyên nhắn tin hỏi han. Đi vào thời điểm thấp điểm nên khá vắng và yên tĩnh. sample_comments.title: Perfect
sample_comments.text:
Everything was astonishingly wonderful. Two weeks ago, I had a vacation here; however, there were a few experiences that weren't okay, and I shared my feedback. Nevertheless, my impression with my husband was still very positive, so we still plan to come back. Afterwards, the staff reached out via text and phone to inquire and promised to support me on my next visit. This time, everything was perfect down to the last detail. 
I have stayed at many resorts, some of which are more beautiful and some of which are of higher quality. But when it comes to customer service and hospitality, I can assure you that Flamingo has left an unforgettable impression on me. 
My husband has decided that whenever we travel back to Vietnam or have any family events, Flamingo will be our first choice. 
We already have two plans for booking for our upcoming vacation and our daughter's coming-of-age ceremony here.

sample_comments.title: Experience a wonderful vacation.
sample_comments.text:
The best vacation my family has ever had. We will definitely come back many more times, and I will introduce it to all my relatives and friends to experience . 
In particular, I am very satisfied with the hotel's reception and service staff. Especially the receptionist Huong Ly and her colleague Minh, who were very enthusiastic in welcoming and assisting us. 
The electric car drivers were also very friendly and quick to help. The gatekeepers were very welcoming and supportive of our group. The staff in the luggage area were just as friendly and eager to assist. 
One member of our group had a birthday on the day of our stay at the hotel and received a cake and a very meaningful greeting. 
Thank you very much to all the members of Forest In The Sky hotel and all the members of Flamingo Resort!
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Thân gửi Quý khách,

Thay mặt toàn thể đội ngũ, tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn chân thành tới Quý khách đã chia sẻ những cảm xúc về kỹ nghỉ tại Flamingo Đại Lải Resort,
Chúng tôi rất hạnh phúc khi những giá trị về con người và sản phẩm dịch vụ mà đội ngũ luôn tâm huyết, mong muốn mang đến cho Quý khách những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ nhất đã phần nào được Quý khách công nhận và chia sẻ những điều đó đến với cộng đồng.
Cảm ơn Quý khách đã luôn lựa chọn Flamingo Đại Lải Resort, chúng tôi luôn hy vọng được chào đón Quý khách trong kỳ nghỉ gần nhất.

Trân trong!

Lê Bình Minh
Quản lý Tiền sảnh
Flamingo Đại Lải Resort

1. Booking a room here includes free entrance tickets, swimming and playing, free electric cars, and bicycles.
2. It's advisable to book a room with massage services. They have great body massage and steam sauna here.

sample_comments.title: A True 5-Star Experience - Exceptional Service & Worth Every Penny!
sample_comments.text:
From the moment we arrived at the resort hotel, the experience was pure 5-star luxury. The staff was incredibly caring, always checking in to see if we needed anything, offering assistance with a smile, and making us feel genuinely welcomed and well taken care of. After a disappointing 4-night stay in an owner's villa, moving to the hotel was a huge relief---the difference was night and day.

Key Differences Between the Hotel & Owner's Villa:

Exceptional Service: In the hotel, the staff was super sweet and attentive, making sure we were comfortable at all times. The owner's villa? No service at all---you're on your own.

Space & Comfort: The owner's villa was just a basic bedroom, while our hotel room was spacious with a foldable sofa---a perfect extra sleeping place for our child.

No Hidden Fees: At the hotel, all key amenities were included, while in the villa, we had to pay extra for almost everything, making the "cheaper" villa not so cheap after all.

Hotel Stay - What We Loved:

 Staff & Service: The best part! They were attentive, friendly, and truly cared about guests.
 Food & Beverage: Top-notch quality. Breakfast was fantastic, and our dinner-inclusive package let us try almost everything. Portions are huge, and everything was super tasty.
 Korean Sauna & Spa: An amazing experience, included in our rate. The spa area is huge and perfect for relaxation.
 Activities for Kids & Families:

Grass sliding

Bicycle rentals (great for exploring)

Fishing pond (you can rent a rod)

Kids' room with fun activities
 Recreation & Games: Available for an additional fee---billiards, foosball (kicker), and more.
 Rooms & Sleep Quality: Super clean, with comfy beds and perfectly soft pillows. A true luxury experience.

Price Breakdown - Is It Worth It?

For a 2 adults + 1 child stay, here's how the costs compare:

Owner's Villa Costs:

Villa rent: 900k VND

Resort entrance fee: 150 + 150 + 105k VND

Breakfast (if not included): 256 + 256k VND

Swimming pool: 50 + 50 + 35k VND

Kids club: 100k VND

Korean sauna: 299k VND
Total: 2,350k VND (without extra comfort or service)

Hotel Costs:

Hotel stay with breakfast, swimming pool, and kids club included: 1,800k VND

Hotel stay with breakfast, HUGE dinner, swimming pool, kids club, and Korean sauna once per day: 2,550k VND

 Bottom Line: The hotel offers far more value for a similar price, without hidden fees and with a much better experience.

Additional Tips:

Convenient Shopping: Right outside the hotel's security gate, there are a couple of local grocery stores within walking distance.

Nearby Village: A 5-minute drive away, there's a small village with pharmacies and more shops. A round-trip ride costs around 100k VND.

Our Recommendation:

Skip the owner's villa and book the hotel instead. It's a real 5-star experience, stress-free, and worth every penny. Highly recommend getting the dinner-inclusive package---it's amazing value.

sample_comments.title: The first overseas trip with my friend's family.
sample_comments.text: I chose this hotel for my first overseas trip with my friends' family. It was a little away from the bustling streets and was quiet. The room was clean and had a good sense of cleanliness. The breakfast was delicious as well. The staff was very polite. When I told the person at the front desk that I was not good at English, they explained things clearly and slowly. There was a large shopping center a short walk away, which was convenient. I would like to use it again.

sample_comments.title: The quality was very good for the price.
sample_comments.text: The accommodation management and cleanliness were great, and the pool was nice too! The resort had more facilities than I expected, and it was good for walks. There wasn't much talk about the restaurants, but the breakfast was delicious, and I enjoyed the lunch restaurant as well! The main pool was well maintained, and all the staff were friendly!! I am taking away very good memories I think it would be nice to come back with my family next time. One regret I have is that there was no mart, which was really disappointingㅠㅠ!!

sample_comments.title: Cauchemar au flamingo
sample_comments.text: Nous avons pris une nuit au flamingo avant de prendre notre vol retour à 23h55. Nous pensions nous reposer car nous étions quatre avec un bébé de 18 mois. Notre cauchemar a commencé à l'aéroport de ha noi. Nous arrivions de hué. Le chauffeur de taxi, qui ne parlait pas un mot d'anglais ne savait pas où se trouvait cet hotel il nous a fait tourner plus d'une heure en faisant 45 km au lieu de 25. (Il est mentionné à 16 km de l'aéroport sur le site !!!!!!) à l'arrivée discussion avec le chauffeur qui ne veut rien entendre. Prix exorbitant et en prime il a gardé dans son véhicule notre lit bébé mais n'a jamais voulu le reconnaître....un voleur. Nous avons demandé à l'hôtel de pouvoir garder une chambre sur deux un peu plus longtemps : refus. A 11h55 qq un est venu nous sortir et là on s'est vraiment senti indésirable. Pour un 5 étoiles, pas de serviette pour la piscine sans payer...on est parti soulagés mais avec une mauvaise impression sur le Vietnam .

En dehors de cela, le personnel est tres gentils, petit dejeuner est tres bon , qualité des diners sont meilleures ailleurs (europeen et vietnamien).

sample_comments.title: ハノイ近くのリゾート
sample_comments.text:
ハノイからバスで約1時間半なので、週末を利用して行きました。
釣りにゴルフ、水泳と、いろいろなアクティビティが楽しめるので、アウトドア派の人は楽しいと思います。
・シャトルバス：リゾート行きは、Thong Nhat park(7:30) , Royal City(11:00)が、リゾートからは、Thong Nhat park(14:00), Royal city(17:00)がありました。予約したほうがいいようです。私は無料で乗りましたが、一部の人はお金を払って乗っていました。
・レストラン：リゾート価格か飲み物やちょっとした食べ物でも高いので、飲み物やお菓子などある程度持って行っても良いと思います。リゾート内は売店がありません。ベトナム人の人は夕ご飯まで持ちこんで調理し（？）食べていました。
朝食はブッフェでしたが、会場はまるで戦場のような騒ぎ、カオスです。夕食も団体客がいると、うるさいことこの上ないので、時間をずらして行ったほうが落ち着くと思います。
・夜は星が少し見えて、静かだったのでゆっくりできました。

sample_comments.title: ハノイ長期滞在者の息抜き場所に
sample_comments.text: ハノイからタクシーで1.5時間、2,000円くらいで行けます。ベトナムとは思えない豪華さです。施設が広く、全部回ると自転車でも1日かかります。アートに力を入れているようで、各所に作品があり、南のビーチ近くには森の中に作品を飾ったコンテナ(冷房付き)がいくつも点在しています。料理やサービスは普通ですが、森林浴できますので、仕事に疲れ、一息つきたい時に行くにはいい場所です。

sample_comments.title: 自然満喫できました
sample_comments.text:
ヒルトップビラに宿泊しました。2月の訪問だったので、プールの用意をしていかなかったのですが、温水だったので水着を持っていくべきだったと後悔しました。お風呂やトイレの部屋が若干窓やドアに隙間があり、そこから虫が入ってこないか不安でした。案の定、トイレの中に大きなナメクジがいて子供が怖がっていましたが、他は満足できました。
スタッフに英語がなかなか通じなかったのが苦労しました。
朝ごはんはフォレストビラのほうにあるレストランでしたが、種類も多く満足できました。

sample_comments.text: 가족과 휴가를 보내기 위해 기껏 2박3일 풀빌라를 방문하였는데, 옆빌라가 공사중이라 2박3일 내내 공사소리만 잔뜩 듣고 왔습니다. 너무 시끄러워소 빌라에 붙은 수영장도 이용할수가 없었습니다. 100일 아기도 함께한 여행이었는데, 아무리 컴플레인해도 나아지지 않았고, 결국 방을 옮기라고 하는데 아기 포함해서 온가족 짐을 다 들고 옮기기도 엄청 번거로웠구요. 이런 공사장 옆방은 아에 비워둬야하는 것 아닌가요? 최악입니다.

sample_comments.title: 진짜 최악이었던 여행
sample_comments.text: 설 연휴를 맞아 가족과함께 2박 풀빌라 예약을 해서 갔더니 식당 4군데중 한곳만 열어서 체크인하자마자 10층에 있는 베트남 식당에서 마르게리따피자와 나폴리탄 파스타를 주문했어요. 그런데 손님이 우리밖에 없는데 음식은 30분이 지나도록 나오지 않았고 조리중인지 확인요청을 하고 5분뒤 반쯤 식은피자가 나왔어요. 그리고 피자 반쯤 먹어갈때까지 파스타가 나오지 않아 다시 확인요청을 하니 주문누락.... 손님이 우리밖에 없는데 어째서 주문누락이 될수가 있는지.. 그리고 주문받은 그 직원은 사과도 하지않고 그냥 가더니 5분뒤 파스타를 가져왔고 그 직원에게 너는 미안하다는 말을 할줄 모르냐고 베트남어로 물었고 그 직원은 변명을 늘어놓았죠. 그리고 중요한건 음식이 정말 너무 형편없었어요. 피자도 달고 파스타는 정말 먹을수 없을정도로 달았어요. 그리고 다음날 그 음식을 먹고 저희가족은 배탈이 났어요. 저녁에 도저히 그 식당에서 밥을 먹기 싫어서 숙소에서 컵라면하나만 먹고 잤는데 배탈이 난거 보면 피자와 파스타가 문제있었던거같아요. 그래서 2박을 예약했지만 다음날 오후2시에 체크아웃을 했고 로비 직원은 방을 바꿔주겠다 했는데 방이 문제가 아니고 여기 부대시설과 음식이 문제여서 그냥 체크아웃하고 돌아갑니다. 앞으로 플라밍고는 다시는 안올겁니다.

sample_comments.text:
호텔에 체크인하러 들어가서 체크인않하고 방구경하지도 않고 택시불러달래서 나왔습니다.

sample_comments.text: 하노이 근처에 유일한 풀빌라 리조트라 이용했는데 너무 실망스러웠음... 일단 힐탑 빌라였눈데 너무 노후된듯한 시설에 관리를 전혀안하는 느낌.. 고급스러움 1도없고 장수말벌이 상주하고있어 수영을 제대로 즐기지 못했을뿐더러 .. 식당도 가격은 비싼데 맛도없고 음식사진이 없어서 메뉴고르는데에 실패하였고 조식은... 진짜 심함... 무슨 수련회 온줄.....대학생인지 뭔지 떼거지 사람들에 음식수준은... 휴........ 심각 그리고 체크인 시간 많이남아서 마사지나받우려고 스파샵으로 가달라햇는데 발마사지가 1시간에 10만동(5만원) .. 시설은 되게 좋음.. 근데 체크인하고서 리조트 시설 안내도? 이런거조는데 마사지샵이 두군데였움. 근데 한군데는 호텔이용객할인도되고 가격 나름괜찮음. 우리는 완전비싼곳으로 간거였음.... 황당함.... 그리고 시내랑 너무널어서 택시비도 많이나옵니다...
